author: lOrm
content: FORBIDDEN: src/tools/bash/output.rs is on the locked file list for this bulk pass. The '(no new output)' path at lines 39-43 conflates 'silent command' with 'already drained'. Mandated refactor (distinguish lifetime-cumulative-empty vs. since-last-poll-empty, always render exit-code on finished) stands for a bash-focused worktree.
